editorial_reasoning.calendar_tier: TIER 2 — Heavy Coverage Day. NFL Draft Week (April 23-25), NBA Play-In Tournament (April 14-17), WNBA Draft (April 13)
editorial_reasoning.dominant_topic: WNBA Draft should lead — Tier 2 calendar event that JUST happened, plus the UConn reunion story has strong narrative juice. NBA Play-In starts TODAY but those games are tonight.

candidates_considered.story: WNBA Draft - Azzi Fudd #1, reunites with Paige Bueckers in Dallas
candidates_considered.hook: Back-to-back UConn #1 picks, relationship angle, $500K salary, UCLA broke records
LeBron vs KD historic matchup, 4 win-or-go-home games
Coach Mac, beloved figure, Cardinals connection
Generic draft content, no fresh angle

stories.headline: Dallas Wings Reunite UConn Power Couple with Azzi Fudd at #1
stories.editorial_direction: This is the relationship angle EVERYONE is talking about. Back-to-back UConn #1 picks who are dating. Fudd making $500K (7x what Paige made last year). UCLA also broke records. Go deep on the draft night moment, the salary jump, the basketball fit.

tweets.text:
THE DALLAS WINGS SELECT AZZI FUDD WITH THE NO. 1 PICK IN THE WNBA DRAFT ‼️

Reunited with Paige Bueckers
Paige Bueckers excited the Dallas Wings drafted her girlfriend Azzi Fudd with the number 1 pick in the draft.
The crowd reaction while Azzi Fudd was being interviewed when they showed Paige Bueckers on the screen 😂😂

WNBA Draft Top 4:

1 — Azzi Fudd
2 — Olivia Miles
3 — Awa Fam
4 — Lauren Betts

Did they get it right?

The Dallas Wings had the number 1 overall pick in 2025 and 2026 WNBA Drafts: 

2025 — Paige Bueckers 
2026 — Azzi Fudd

Paige Bueckers' reaction to Azzi Fudd getting drafted to the same WNBA team as her 🔥 

Back-to-back No. 1 picks from UConn to Dallas!

key_stats: Fudd making $500,000 in rookie year — 7x what Paige made in 2025
7th UConn player to be #1 pick in WNBA history
5th team ever to have back-to-back #1 picks
Fudd shot 45% from 3-point range, led nation in 3-pointers made (117)
relationship_angle: Fudd and Bueckers are in a public relationship since 2025
Their friendship dates back to 2017 USA U-16 team
Bueckers recruited Fudd to come to UConn in high school
They won national championship together at UConn
salary_revolution: New CBA ratified last month gave massive rookie pay raises
Top pick salary jumped from ~$70K to $500K
League salary cap rose from $1.5M to $7M
basketball_fit: Wings added veteran posts Alanna Smith and Jessica Shepard in free agency
Fudd complements Arike Ogunbowale and Bueckers in backcourt
Fudd is elite shooter — exactly what Dallas needed
Wings missed playoffs with 10-34 record, this should fix offense
draft_night_moments: Crowd erupted when Fudd's name called
Walked on stage in brown/gold dress to Lady Gaga 'Abracadabra'
Room reaction when Paige appeared on screen during Fudd interview was iconic
ucla_records: UCLA had 6 players drafted — most ever from single school
5 UCLA players went in first round — also a record
Lauren Betts #4, Gabriela Jaquez #5, Kiki Rice #6 all Bruins
Champions from April 5 title cashing in
historical_context: UConn now has 7 #1 picks in WNBA history
Third time UConn had back-to-back #1 selections
Wings join rare company with consecutive #1 picks
where_it_goes: Wings should finally make playoffs with this backcourt
Fudd/Bueckers will be most-watched duo in WNBA

stories.headline: NBA Play-In Tournament Tips Off Tonight with Historic LeBron-KD Showdown
stories.editorial_direction: Four win-or-go-home games tonight and tomorrow. LeBron vs KD is the marquee matchup — two players with 75,000+ combined points. Also highlight the other key matchups and what's at stake.

tweets.text:
Detroit this season:

— 1st in steals
— 1st in blocks

The first team with 850+ steals and 500+ blocks since the 1983 Nets.
LaMelo Ball and Kon Knueppel knockdown a bunch of threes and lead the Hornets over the Heat in the opening game of the Play-In Tournament

Zion Williamson has been in the NBA for 7 SEASONS and has not played a single playoff game 😭 

"I want to experience the playoffs...It's frustrating getting up here every year and not being  in the playoffs. And I take my responsibility in that"

tonight_games: Heat (10) at Hornets (9), 7:30 ET — loser eliminated
Trail Blazers (8) at Suns (7), 10 ET — winner gets 7 seed
tomorrow_games: Magic (8) at 76ers (7), 7:30 ET — winner gets 7 seed
Warriors (10) at Clippers (9), 10 ET — loser eliminated
historic_matchup: Lakers vs Rockets will be first playoff meeting between players with 75,000+ combined career points
LeBron has 38,000+, KD has 37,000+ — combined they're over 75,000
Both legendary scorers, different eras meeting
storylines: Hornets beat Heat in play-in game — LaMelo Ball's playoff debut
Zion quote about never making playoffs in 7 seasons is devastating
Deni Avdija's breakout All-Star season has Portland in postseason for first time since 2021
format: Teams 7-10 in each conference battle for 7th and 8th seeds
7 vs 8 winner gets 7 seed, loser gets second chance
All games exclusive on Prime Video

stories.headline: NFL Mourns Dave McGinnis, the Coach Who Made Everyone Feel Like Family
stories.editorial_direction: Respectful tribute to Coach Mac. Focus on his personality, the famous Cardinals finale, and how beloved he was across the league. Keep it brief but heartfelt.

tweets.text:
Former NFL coach Dave McGinnis died Monday, the Titans announced. McGinnis, 74, had been hospitalized with an illness since early March, as per the team's release.

https://www.espn.com/nfl/story/_/id/48479231/former-tennessee-titans-assistant-dave-mcginnis-dies-74

who_he_was: Known as 'Coach Mac' — beloved throughout NFL
Cardinals head coach 2000-2003, went 17-40 but loved by players
Famous final game: Josh McCown to Nate Poole beat Vikings, knocked them out of playoffs
coaching_career: 30+ years in NFL — Bears, Cardinals, Titans, Rams
Coached Pat Tillman throughout his NFL career
Was spokesman who revealed Tillman's Army enlistment plans
personality: Called himself 'ball coach through and through'
Known for passion, enthusiasm, Texas twang
Players called him family — not just coach
legacy: Coached 8 Hall of Fame players during career
Had famous postgame speech after Cardinals upset Vikings
Most recently Titans radio analyst since 2017

around_the_league.text:
In the Bronx:

Trout —                                    Judge —
3-5                                            2-5
2 HR                                          2 HR
5 RBI                                        3 RBI
3 R                                             2 R

Kyle Schwarber vs Cubs:

2-3
2 HR
3 RBI
1 BB
1 HBP

Only the second NL player to score 4 runs in a game this season.

On the docket for the NFL draft this week:

Wednesday: the final day for teams to host prospects on pre-draft 30 visits

Also Wednesday: Georgia LB CJ Allen will run a 40-yard dash

Friday: Arizona State WR Jordyn Tyson will do a positional drills workout

Garrett Crochet vs Twins:

1.2 IP
9 H
11 R (10 ER)
3 BB
0 SO

First time he gives up 8+ ER in a MLB start.

THE FLYERS HEAD TO THE PLAYOFFS FOR THE FIRST TIME IN 6 YEARS‼️ 

Philly will face off with in-state rival Pittsburgh 🍿

Pirates 1-3 hitters vs Nats:

Cruz | 2-3, 3 RBI, 2 BB, 1 SB
Lowe | 3-5, 1 HR, 5 RBI, 1 HBP
Reynolds | 3-4, 1 3B, 4 RBI, 1 HBP

Drove in 12 runs.
Tyrese Haliburton's noticeable weight gain is due to medication he was taking during a bout with shingles that left him out of shape, per @DustinDopirak

JRam vs St. Louis:

2-4
1 2B
1 BB
2 SB

Only the fourth player to put up those numbers in a game this season.

Josh Naylor vs Astros:

2-5
2 HR
5 RBI

Mariners sweep a 4-game series against the Astros for the first time since 2018.
An hour 20 mix of a little Star Wars and a lot of Cubs. Always enjoy my chats with the leaders of the maniacs. Go Cubs

tweets.text: Let all those making draft pick announcements next week study this one: taunts Dallas…..then selects Dallas.
